title: FedNow Customer Credit Transfer
description: FI-to-FI customer credit transfer via FedNow instant payments. Real sample published by the Federal Reserve. Individual A (BankA, ABA 111111111) pays Corporation B (ABA 333333333), referencing invoice INV34563.

title: FedNow Payment Accept (ACTC)
description: Payment status report confirming acceptance (ACTC) of a FedNow credit transfer. Real sample published by the Federal Reserve. References original UETR 8a562c67-ca16-48ba-b074-65581be6f011.

title: FedNow Payment Reject (RJCT)
description: Payment status report indicating rejection due to closed beneficiary account (AC04). Demonstrates mandatory StsRsnInf block.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.002.001.10">
  <FIToFIPmtStsRpt>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-STS-20260528-002</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T10:15:00Z</CreDtTm>
    </GrpHdr>
    <TxInfAndSts>
      <OrgnlInstrId>INSTR-20260528-002</OrgnlInstrId>
      <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-FNOW-2026052800002</OrgnlEndToEndId>
      <OrgnlUETR>a1b2c3d4-5e6f-7a8b-9c0d-e1f2a3b4c5d6</OrgnlUETR>
      <TxSts>RJCT</TxSts>
      <StsRsnInf>
        <Rsn>
          <Cd>AC04</Cd>
        </Rsn>
        <AddtlInf>Account has been closed at receiving institution</AddtlInf>
      </StsRsnInf>
      <InstgAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>WFBIUS6S</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </InstgAgt>
      <InstdAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>CITIUS33</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </InstdAgt>
    </TxInfAndSts>
  </FIToFIPmtStsRpt>
</Document>

children.value: Account has been closed at receiving institution

title: SEPA Credit Transfer Initiation
description: Customer-to-bank payment initiation for two SEPA credit transfers (EUR 6,543.14 + EUR 112.72). Real sample from the European Payments Council reference implementation (salesking/sepa_king). Debtor IBAN DE87200500001234567890, Creditor IBAN DE21500500009876543210.
rawXml:
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.03" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.001.001.03 pain.001.001.03.xsd">
  <CstmrCdtTrfInitn>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>Message-ID-4711</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2010-11-11T09:30:47.000Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>2</NbOfTxs>
      <InitgPty>
        <Nm>Initiator Name</Nm>
      </InitgPty>
    </GrpHdr>
    <PmtInf>
      <PmtInfId>Payment-Information-ID-4711</PmtInfId>
      <PmtMtd>TRF</PmtMtd>
      <BtchBookg>true</BtchBookg>
      <NbOfTxs>2</NbOfTxs>
      <CtrlSum>6655.86</CtrlSum>
      <PmtTpInf>
        <SvcLvl>
          <Cd>SEPA</Cd>
        </SvcLvl>
      </PmtTpInf>
      <ReqdExctnDt>2010-11-25</ReqdExctnDt>
      <Dbtr>
        <Nm>Debtor Name</Nm>
      </Dbtr>
      <DbtrAcct>
        <Id>
          <IBAN>DE87200500001234567890</IBAN>
        </Id>
      </DbtrAcct>
      <DbtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BIC>BANKDEFFXXX</BIC>
        </FinInstnId>
      </DbtrAgt>
      <ChrgBr>SLEV</ChrgBr>
      <CdtTrfTxInf>
        <PmtId>
          <EndToEndId>OriginatorID1234</EndToEndId>
        </PmtId>
        <Amt>
          <InstdAmt Ccy="EUR">6543.14</InstdAmt>
        </Amt>
        <CdtrAgt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BIC>SPUEDE2UXXX</BIC>
          </FinInstnId>
        </CdtrAgt>
        <Cdtr>
          <Nm>Creditor Name</Nm>
        </Cdtr>
        <CdtrAcct>
          <Id>
            <IBAN>DE21500500009876543210</IBAN>
          </Id>
        </CdtrAcct>
        <RmtInf>
          <Ustrd>Unstructured Remittance Information</Ustrd>
        </RmtInf>
      </CdtTrfTxInf>
      <CdtTrfTxInf>
        <PmtId>
          <EndToEndId>OriginatorID1235</EndToEndId>
        </PmtId>
        <Amt>
          <InstdAmt Ccy="EUR">112.72</InstdAmt>
        </Amt>
        <CdtrAgt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BIC>SPUEDE2UXXX</BIC>
          </FinInstnId>
        </CdtrAgt>
        <Cdtr>
          <Nm>Other Creditor Name</Nm>
        </Cdtr>
        <CdtrAcct>
          <Id>
            <IBAN>DE21500500001234567897</IBAN>
          </Id>
        </CdtrAcct>
        <RmtInf>
          <Ustrd>Unstructured Remittance Information</Ustrd>
        </RmtInf>
      </CdtTrfTxInf>
    </PmtInf>
  </CstmrCdtTrfInitn>
</Document>

title: FedNow Payment Return
description: Return of a previously settled FedNow payment due to incorrect account number (AC01). Original amount $750 returned in full.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pacs.004.001.09">
  <PmtRtr>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-RTR-20260528-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T11:45:00Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <SttlmInf>
        <SttlmMtd>CLRG</SttlmMtd>
      </SttlmInf>
    </GrpHdr>
    <TxInf>
      <RtrId>RTR-FNOW-20260528-001</RtrId>
      <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-FNOW-2026052800003</OrgnlEndToEndId>
      <OrgnlUETR>c7d8e9f0-1a2b-3c4d-5e6f-7a8b9c0d1e2f</OrgnlUETR>
      <RtrdIntrBkSttlmAmt Ccy="USD">750.00</RtrdIntrBkSttlmAmt>
      <IntrBkSttlmDt>2026-05-28</IntrBkSttlmDt>
      <RtrRsnInf>
        <Rsn>
          <Cd>AC01</Cd>
        </Rsn>
        <AddtlInf>Incorrect account number - no matching account found</AddtlInf>
      </RtrRsnInf>
    </TxInf>
  </PmtRtr>
</Document>

children.value: Incorrect account number - no matching account found

title: Payment Status Request
description: FI requesting status of a previously submitted FedNow credit transfer that has not yet received a response.

title: FedNow Request for Payment (RFP)
description: Creditor-initiated request for payment through FedNow. A merchant requests $320 from a customer for an e-commerce order.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:pain.013.001.07">
  <CdtrPmtActvtnReq>
    <GrpHdr>
      <MsgId>FNOW-RFP-20260528-001</MsgId>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T14:00:00Z</CreDtTm>
      <NbOfTxs>1</NbOfTxs>
      <InitgPty>
        <Nm>TechStore Inc.</Nm>
      </InitgPty>
    </GrpHdr>
    <PmtInf>
      <PmtInfId>RFP-PMT-001</PmtInfId>
      <PmtMtd>TRF</PmtMtd>
      <ReqdExctnDt>
        <Dt>2026-05-28</Dt>
      </ReqdExctnDt>
      <XpryDt>
        <Dt>2026-05-29</Dt>
      </XpryDt>
      <Dbtr>
        <Nm>Carol Anderson</Nm>
      </Dbtr>
      <DbtrAcct>
        <Id><Othr><Id>998877665544</Id></Othr></Id>
      </DbtrAcct>
      <DbtrAgt>
        <FinInstnId>
          <BICFI>USBANK1</BICFI>
        </FinInstnId>
      </DbtrAgt>
      <CdtTrfTxInf>
        <PmtId>
          <EndToEndId>E2E-RFP-2026052800001</EndToEndId>
        </PmtId>
        <Amt>
          <InstdAmt Ccy="USD">320.00</InstdAmt>
        </Amt>
        <CdtrAgt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>FNBOUS44</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </CdtrAgt>
        <Cdtr>
          <Nm>TechStore Inc.</Nm>
        </Cdtr>
        <CdtrAcct>
          <Id><Othr><Id>223344556677</Id></Othr></Id>
        </CdtrAcct>
        <RmtInf>
          <Ustrd>Order #TS-2026-05280 - Electronics Purchase</Ustrd>
        </RmtInf>
      </CdtTrfTxInf>
    </PmtInf>
  </CdtrPmtActvtnReq>
</Document>

title: SEPA Payment Cancellation Request
description: Request to cancel a previously submitted SEPA credit transfer due to duplicate payment. Uses camt.056 recall mechanism.
rawXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Document xmlns="urn:iso:std:iso:20022:tech:xsd:camt.056.001.08">
  <FIToFIPmtCxlReq>
    <Assgnmt>
      <Id>CXLREQ-SEPA-20260528-001</Id>
      <Assgnr>
        <Agt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>COBADEFFXXX</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </Agt>
      </Assgnr>
      <Assgne>
        <Agt>
          <FinInstnId>
            <BICFI>BNPAFRPPXXX</BICFI>
          </FinInstnId>
        </Agt>
      </Assgne>
      <CreDtTm>2026-05-28T15:00:00Z</CreDtTm>
    </Assgnmt>
    <Undrlyg>
      <TxInf>
        <CxlId>CXL-20260528-001</CxlId>
        <OrgnlEndToEndId>E2E-SEPA-2026052800001</OrgnlEndToEndId>
        <OrgnlUETR>e5f6a7b8-9c0d-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d7e8f9a0b</OrgnlUETR>
        <OrgnlIntrBkSttlmAmt Ccy="EUR">1850.00</OrgnlIntrBkSttlmAmt>
        <OrgnlIntrBkSttlmDt>2026-05-28</OrgnlIntrBkSttlmDt>
        <CxlRsnInf>
          <Rsn>
            <Cd>DUPL</Cd>
          </Rsn>
          <AddtlInf>Duplicate payment - original sent via batch file in error</AddtlInf>
        </CxlRsnInf>
      </TxInf>
    </Undrlyg>
  </FIToFIPmtCxlReq>
</Document>

children.value: Duplicate payment - original sent via batch file in error
